title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know
• Summer blues for crude tankers as VLCC spot rates stabilize- So far, August has been a quiet month for crude tankers, with relatively few deals concluded and limited prospects on the horizon for the VLCC market. Read More

Gibson Tanker Market Report
For product tankers, much of the past decade's investment was focused on changing dynamics in the global refining scene. In short, the story of expanding capacity in the East, primarily driven by Middle East export refineries, and capacity rationalisation in the West supported the case for strong tonne mile demand growth.

children.title: Gibson Tanker Market Report
children.summary: For product tankers, much of the past decade's investment was focused on changing dynamics in the global refining scene. In short, the story of expanding capacity in the East, primarily driven by Middle East export refineries, and capacity rationalisation in the West supported the case for strong tonne mile demand growth.

children.title: Increase from late July
children.summary: The most recently released data shows that daily crude steel output at large and medium-sized mills in China averaged 2.15 million tons during August 1 - 10. This marks a 0.5% increase from late July and is up year-on-year by 11%.

children.title: Increase from late July
children.summary: The most recently released data shows that daily crude steel output at large and medium-sized mills in China averaged 2.15 million tons during August 1 - 10. This marks a 0.5% increase from late July and is up year-on-year by 11%.

children.title: Beijing offered only tepid support for the economy
section_path: Beijing offered only tepid support for the economy
children.section_path_text: Beijing offered only tepid support for the economy
children.summary: Commodity markets edged higher after Beijing slightly eased monetary policy to help support economic growth. Energy markets were pushed higher amid rising risks of supply disruptions.

children.title: Snapshot of Spot Freight Rates, Supply-Demand Trends, Port Congestions
section_path: Snapshot of Spot Freight Rates, Supply-Demand Trends, Port Congestions
children.section_path_text: Snapshot of Spot Freight Rates, Supply-Demand Trends, Port Congestions
children.summary:
The third week of August began with more robust sentiment, which countered fears about a possible downward trend in the Capesize segment. Read More

children.title: Snapshot of Crude and Product Freight Rates, Supply-Demand
section_path: Snapshot of Crude and Product Freight Rates, Supply-Demand
children.section_path_text: Snapshot of Crude and Product Freight Rates, Supply-Demand
children.summary:
In the third week of August, downward pressure continues on the VLCC MEG route to China, while Saudi Arabia's crude oil exports to all destinations are expected to decline significantly over the summer compared to the previous two years. Read More
